name: Veal Scaloppine with Avocado
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Veal scaloppine, from the tenderloin, sliced about 1/4-inch thick
1 Avocado, peeled and cut into 8 even slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound meat between waxed paper until 1/8-inch thick.
2. Combine the next four ingredients in a shallow dish.
3. Coat veal in mixture; shake off excess and set aside.
4. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
5. In a large skillet, heat 5 tablespoons butter and oil over moderately high heat.
6. Saute half of veal at a time until lightly browned, about 2 to 3 minutes on each side. Remove to a warm platter.
7. Add vermouth to skillet and boil, scraping up browned bits, until liquid is reduced by half.
8. Add stock and 3 tablespoons lemon juice, stirring well.
9. Add parsley. Return veal to skillet and simmer for about 2 minutes.
10. Sprinkle avocado with 1 tablespoon lemon juice. Bake in small ovenproof dish for 5 minutes.
11. Lower heat and whisk remaining butter into sauce a teaspoonful at a time until slightly thickened.
12. Place veal scallops on a warm platter and surround with avocado slices. Pour sauce over and serve immediately. Serves 6 to 8.
